doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The 5-day notice requirement and basic service methods reflect real provisions of 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but the email service clause and "conformed text 2024" presentation appear to be fabricated additions not found in the actual statute.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: The core 5-day notice requirement and much of 735 ILCS 5/9-209 is genuine, but the document adds interpretive language (e.g., the email service provision and specific "conformed text 2024" framing) that does not appear verbatim in the actual statute, mixing real statutory content with embellished or fabricated details.
response_turn2:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 74
REASON: The 5-day notice requirement and basic service methods reflect real provisions of 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but the email service clause and "conformed text 2024" presentation appear to be fabricated additions not found in the actual statute.
